title: Programmes Offered at Nalanda University 2026

detail.title: Programmes Offered at Nalanda University 2026
detail.short_info: Nalanda University Admission 2026 is open for PG and PhD programmes. Apply online now for M.A., M.Sc., MBA & Ph.D. courses. Check eligibility, fees, and admission process on the official website.

content.text: Nalanda University has opened admissions for the academic year 2026 for various Master's like PG (M.A./M.Sc./MBA) and Ph.D. programmes. Applications are invited from Indian and International students. Interested candidates can apply online through the official portal. Keep watching the official website for detailed deadlines and updates.

items: M.A. in Hindu Studies (Sanātana Dharma) — 2 Years
M.B.A. in Sustainable Development and Management — 2 Years (with Exit Option after 1 Year with Diploma)
M.Sc. in Ecology and Environment Studies — 2 Years
M.A. in Buddhist Studies, Philosophy and Comparative Religions — 2 Years
M.A. in International Relations and Peace Studies — 2 Years
Master’s in Science and Technology Policy Studies — 2 Years
M.Sc. in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence — 2 Years
Ph.D. in Buddhist Studies, Philosophy and Comparative Religions — 4 Years
Ph.D. in Ecology and Environment Studies — 4 Years
Ph.D. in Hindu Studies (Sanātana Dharma) — 4 Years
Ph.D. in International Relations and Peace Studies — 4 Years
Ph.D. in Sustainable Development and Management — 4 Years
Ph.D. in World Literature in English — 4 Years

content.text: Admissions are open. Check the official website for exact last dates (Ph.D. last date mentioned as 30th June 2026 in some updates).

rows: Minimum 3 years Bachelor’s degree (10+2+3) from a recognised University with at least 55% marks or 2.2/4.0 GPA or equivalent. Students from any stream can apply for a maximum of two programmes.
MBA in Sustainable Development and Management
Candidates must meet the Master’s programme eligibility criteria. Additional requirements include CAT/XAT/MAT score with 70 percentile for Indian students or relevant work experience.

Master’s degree with minimum 65% marks. For part-time Ph.D. candidates with experience, minimum 60% marks are required. Research Proposal, Statement of Purpose (SoP), Recommendation Letters, and writing samples are also required.

sections.heading: How to Apply for Nalanda University Admission 2026?

items: Upload required documents (SoP, Bio-Note, transcripts, etc.).
